decisions.resolution: RunPins identify exact Blueprint, Agent, effective PolicySet, ModelPolicy, Environment, and Package source records.
decisions.integrationAction: Replace bare W5 revisions with the canonical exact-source RunPins contract during runtime integration.

decisions.resolution: Forced sibling cancellation is terminalization-only administer-authorized system fencing and cancellation evidence.
decisions.integrationAction: Integrate the closed sibling force-cancel rows without presenting or impersonating a sibling Turn writer.

decisions.resolution: The closed Turn lifecycle has no retry transition.
decisions.integrationAction: W5 runtime, protocol, exports, records, and migrations must remove every Turn retry extension during integration.

decisions.resolution: Terminalization atomically closes and snapshots the complete Run-owner admission registry.
decisions.integrationAction: Implement canonical reservation and remote epoch validation before any frontier claim.

decisions.resolution: Environment pins are exact EnvironmentId, Revision, and Digest identities and remain resolvable while referenced.
decisions.integrationAction: Apply the ready coordinated Environment pin transition without copying W8-owned records.

decisions.resolution: Filesystem mutation uses the canonical Invocation Receipt and readonly wrappers expose only the reader contract.
decisions.integrationAction: Remove profile-specific Receipt substitutes and mutation-shaped readonly APIs.

decisions.resolution: Profile source Events follow successful host Operation Receipt to Event causality.
decisions.integrationAction: Use the closed Receipt-to-Event edge and add no audit root or WriteRecord edge.

decisions.resolution: Edition 1.0.0 pins MCP 2025-11-25, exact impact metadata semantics, and finite prompt bounds.
decisions.integrationAction: Replace configurable placeholder revisions and character-only bounds.

decisions.resolution: Device operations use versioned schemas and a final exact-pair consent check immediately before attempt admission.
decisions.integrationAction: Align all Device codecs and prove the pre-attempt revocation cutoff.

decisions.resolution: Slate rollback changes the active successful deployment pointer without provider contact.
decisions.integrationAction: Retain rollback as mutate and route provider application through externalSend deploy.

decisions.resolution: Cross-DO mediation uses final Tenant issuance and target-local single-use permit consumption.
decisions.integrationAction: Remain pending until issue, reservation, claim, replay, stale join, and target-local atomic consumption are implemented.
